requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: EP - Valid redirect URI shows Google login
precondition: Juice Shop 运行于 http://localhost:3001；已加载默认种子数据（verified 2026-05-30）; Application config includes 'https://authorized-app.com/callback' as an authorized redirect URI.
test_steps:
1. Configure the application with the authorized redirect URI.
2. Initiate the OAuth login flow using redirect_uri='https://authorized-app.com/callback'.
3. Observe the login page for the presence of the Google login option.
expected_result: Redirect to accounts.google.com OAuth with client_id and scope=email
review_reason: 补全 test_data / 修正 expected_result 以匹配 Juice Shop 需求
execution_note: localhost:3001 在 authorizedRedirects 内，OAuth 按钮应可见

requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: EP - Invalid redirect URI hides Google login
precondition: Juice Shop 运行于 http://localhost:3001；已加载默认种子数据（verified 2026-05-30）; Application config does NOT include 'https://malicious.com/callback' as an authorized redirect URI.
test_steps:
1. Ensure the application does not have the unauthorized redirect URI in config.
2. Initiate the OAuth login flow using redirect_uri='https://malicious.com/callback'.
3. Observe the login page to verify that Google login option is not present.
expected_result: Google login option is not displayed.
review_reason: 工具生成用例有效，仅标记审查通过
execution_note: localhost:3001 在 authorizedRedirects 内，OAuth 按钮应可见
